The Story

Cooking is discipline first, flavour second.

Humaira's Kitchen began in a home kitchen in Kurna and grew on word of mouth — one birthday cake, one naming ceremony, one Sallah spread at a time. Today Humaira runs full catering for weddings, festivals and corporate events, and she still hand-pipes every cake that leaves her kitchen.

Beyond the food, Humaira trains upcoming caterers and home bakers, sharing the exact techniques, ratios and plating standards she uses on the job — no shortcuts, no guesswork.

Bespoke Menus Every order built around the client's taste, budget and headcount.
Skills Training One-on-one and small group classes in cake art, pastries & small chops.
Event Ready Weddings, birthdays, Walima, Sallah and corporate functions.
Hygiene Standard Sanitary prep, sealed packaging and on-time delivery, always.
What We Make

Catering built around the occasion

From an intimate birthday to a full wedding party, every plate and every cake is made to order in Humaira's own kitchen.

01

Celebration Cakes

Hand-piped buttercream cakes for birthdays, weddings and naming ceremonies, designed to match your colours and theme.

02

Small Chops & Pastries

Donuts, sausage rolls, meat pies and party small chops, baked fresh and packed for events of any size.

03

Culinary Training

Hands-on classes covering cake decorating, pastry and professional kitchen practice for beginners and rising caterers.

04

Event & Festival Catering

Full-menu catering for Sallah, Walima, corporate functions and festivals — planned, cooked and delivered on schedule.

Learn From Humaira

Train in the kitchen, not just the theory

Humaira runs practical training for anyone who wants to cook, bake or cater professionally — from knife skills to full cake decoration.

  • Cake baking, icing & buttercream flower piping
  • Small chops, pastries and party snack production
  • Large-scale festival and event menu planning
  • Kitchen hygiene, plating and delivery standards
